items.title: Foundation — Architecture & Blueprint
items.notes: ER schema v1.1, map shading spec, tech blueprint, ADL-01–14. Completed 2026-03-07.

items.title: Data Layer — Database Schema & Migrations
items.notes: 19-table Drizzle schema, @libsql/client driver, seed data. Completed 2026-03-07.

items.title: API Layer — Backend REST API
items.notes: Phase 1 accepted. C1-C3 done (commit 3e27383). BC-01–07 correction round 2 complete 2026-03-09.

items.title: UI Layer — React Frontend SPA
items.notes: All P0 bugs closed (BUG-01–05). NR-06 done. PO testing surfaced BUG-11/12/13 + country shading spec change (SHADING-SPEC-01, awaiting PO clarification). QA live testing unblocked.

items.title: QA & Documentation
items.notes: ENV fix done (2026-03-09). README done (NR-08). QA live testing now unblocked. BUG-11/12/13 to be fixed before QA sign-off.

items.title: Integrations — Notification Engine
items.notes: Post-MVP. Not on critical path.

items.title: Trip Management
items.notes: Backend: done. Frontend: implemented. BUG-04 blocks TR-06/07 (status transitions). Needs QA live test.

items.title: Geographic Hierarchy
items.notes: GE-01–11 implemented. GE-12/13 (offline geocoding queue) depends on NR-06 implementation.

items.title: Map View
items.notes: MP-01 (country shading) needs live test. MP-02 (region shading) blocked by BUG-02. MP-03–06 needs live test.

items.title: Item Logging
items.notes: IT-01–06 implemented. IT-07 (carry-forward) blocked by BUG-03. IT-08/09 (rating sort) needs live test.

items.title: Flights
items.notes: Backend and frontend implemented. Awaiting QA live test.

items.notes: Backend and frontend implemented. Awaiting QA live test.

items.notes: Backend and frontend implemented. Awaiting QA live test.

items.notes: Backend and frontend implemented. Awaiting QA live test.

items.title: Photos
items.notes: Photo album reference field implemented. Awaiting QA live test.

items.title: Post-Trip Review
items.notes: RV-04 (lock trip) partially affected by BUG-04 (no return-to-planning path). BUG-05 affects bulk status update.

items.title: Admin & Settings Panel
items.notes: All 5 tabs implemented. Awaiting QA live test.

items.title: Non-Functional Requirements
items.notes: NF-01–03 met. NF-04 (OneDrive) documented via NR-08. NF-05–08 (future migration paths) preserved by architecture. NR-06 (offline retry) in progress.

items.title: City pins never render — TripSummary missing places data
items.notes: Backend fix (BC-01) done 2026-03-09. Frontend city pin fix done (a60ec17). Closed 2026-03-09.

items.title: Region shading broken — DB region_id ≠ ISO 3166-2 codes
items.notes: All layers complete. DB migration (f6af0d5), backend API update (9049ba1), frontend feature-state fix (d76fbf0). Contract suites 99/99. Closed 2026-03-09.

items.title: Carry-forward modal race condition — modal never shown
items.notes: Fixed in a60ec17 — isFetched/isLoading guard added to AddPlaceFlow. Closed 2026-03-09.

items.title: No UI path to revert review_pending → planning
items.notes: Fixed in a60ec17 — Return to Planning button + confirm dialog added to ReviewPanel. Also closes NR-05. Closed 2026-03-09.

items.title: Mark all Completed incorrectly includes next_time items
items.notes: Fixed in a60ec17 — next_time removed from NON_CANCELLED array. Closed 2026-03-09.

items.title: ShadingTab colour picker uses uncontrolled defaultValue
items.notes: Trivial cosmetic issue. Picker doesn't re-sync on re-render; swatch updates correctly. Safe to defer post-beta.

items.title: Backend — 207 TypeScript errors, no type:check:backend script
items.notes: 108x TS2349 (Drizzle union type), 39x TS2554, 27x TS2345, 22x TS7006. Resolved by BC-02/03/04. No runtime impact but blocks type safety going forward.

items.title: Dead coalesce import from drizzle-orm (doesn't exist in v0.38.3)
items.notes: Never called in file body; no runtime crash. Remove import. Resolved by BC-05.

items.title: Main tsconfig.json rootDir defect — prevents backend type-check
items.notes: drizzle.config.ts is outside rootDir. Blocks tsc from reaching backend source. Resolved by BC-04.

items.title: API reference uses wrong item status terms (booked/skipped)
items.notes: API reference doc says 'booked' and 'skipped'. Correct terms are 'confirmed' and 'cancelled' (matches Zod schema + DB). Resolved by BC-06. Doc change only.

items.title: esbuild platform mismatch — live testing blocked in devcontainer
items.notes: postCreateCommand: npm ci added to devcontainer.json. Closed 2026-03-09.

items.title: Add minimal places data to TripSummary response
items.notes: Unblocks BUG-01 (city pins). Frontend awaiting this before implementing city pin fix.

items.title: Add tsconfig.backend.json
items.notes: Resolves BUG-07/09. Backend-specific TypeScript config to isolate type-checking.

items.title: Add type:check:backend npm script
items.notes: Resolves BUG-07. Enables CI to catch backend type errors going forward.

items.title: Fix main tsconfig.json rootDir defect
items.notes: Resolves BUG-09. drizzle.config.ts placement outside rootDir causing tsc failure.

items.title: Remove dead coalesce import from drizzle-orm
items.notes: Resolves BUG-08. Dead import; no runtime impact.

items.title: Fix API reference doc — confirmed/cancelled not booked/skipped
items.notes: Resolves FLAG-F1. Documentation fix only.

items.title: Update API reference for new TripSummary shape
items.notes: Reflects BC-01 change to TripSummary response schema.

items.title: Future tenancy seam — subscription_id in schema
items.notes: Included in BUG-02 migration (f6af0d5). Nullable column added. Closed 2026-03-09.

items.title: Future identity seam — owner_account_id in schema
items.notes: Included in BUG-02 migration (f6af0d5). Nullable column added. Closed 2026-03-09.

items.title: Trip ownership metadata — created_by/updated_by (lightweight)
items.notes: Accepted lightweight only (2 nullable columns max). If it requires auth scaffolding, defer to Phase 2. Not yet specced.

items.title: Carry-forward provenance — is_carried_forward, carried_from_item_id
items.notes: Backend sets is_carried_forward and carried_from_item_id in executeCarryForward(). Confirmed substantially met. Closed.

items.title: Soft trip lock semantics — deliberate unlock action required
items.notes: Closed by BUG-04 fix (a60ec17). Return to Planning button added. Closed 2026-03-09.

items.title: Offline retry policy — progressive backoff, indefinite, manual cancel
items.notes: Implemented in a60ec17. Closed 2026-03-09.

items.title: App offline indicator — lightweight status affordance
items.notes: Accepted Phase 1 but may slip under scope pressure. Single status affordance only. Covered within NR-06 spec (offline indicator section).

items.title: SQLite + OneDrive operating constraint in README before beta
items.notes: README.md created 2026-03-09. Covers setup, OneDrive single-active constraint, multi-user scope note. Closed 2026-03-09.

items.title: Subscription admin boundary — separate from trip-level permissions
items.notes: Phase 2 requirement. No Phase 1 implementation. Architecture preserves seam.

items.title: Delegated trip management — trip-scoped permissions
items.notes: Phase 2 requirement. No Phase 1 implementation.

items.title: Global reference data protection
items.notes: Phase 2 requirement. Additive changes safe; destructive changes tightly controlled.

items.title: Archive instead of hard delete for structured lists
items.notes: Phase 2 requirement. Current Phase 1 uses deactivate/is_active which is aligned.

items.title: Global settings risk control — owner/admin only for destructive changes
items.notes: Phase 2 requirement. No Phase 1 implementation.

items.title: Pre-shared-access hardening gate — formal go/no-go before non-owner access
items.notes: Phase 1.5 gate. Must be completed before access expands beyond owner. Checklist: auth, authorization, storage model, secrets, operational controls. Not yet specced.

items.title: Speed without rebuild principle — no shortcuts that double Phase 2 rework
items.notes: Adopted as standing design review criterion 2026-03-08. Applied retroactively as review lens.

items.title: Bring QA forward — start before frontend completion
items.notes: In effect immediately 2026-03-08. QA began static review while frontend was completing.

items.title: Contract-based test design from API contract
items.notes: In effect immediately 2026-03-08. QA test plan built from API reference.

items.title: Shared regression pack — carry-forward, lock/unlock, city creation
items.notes: In effect immediately 2026-03-08. QA test plan includes regression scenarios.

items.title: Definition of done uplift — scenario validation required for business-critical flows
items.notes: In effect immediately 2026-03-08.

items.title: Backend hotspot sign-off — carry-forward, city patching, write protection
items.notes: In effect immediately 2026-03-08. Applied to backend correction C1-C3 sign-off.

items.title: Pre-access hardening checklist — tied to NR-14
items.notes: Single checklist. Not yet written. Required before Phase 1.5 gate.

items.title: UI/UX expert review of frontend
items.notes: PO direction 2026-03-09. Schedule after Phase 1 sign-off. Beta provides working baseline for UX review.

items.title: Country shading logic — whole country only if all regions visited
items.notes: PO direction 2026-03-09: country shading should only apply if (a) region tier disabled, (b) city has no region assigned, or (c) all regions in country have been visited. Overrides current spec §4 which colours on any city visit. OPEN QUESTION for PO: in case (c), does 'all regions visited' mean at least one city per region on a completed trip? Awaiting confirmation before dispatching architect spec amendment.

items.title: Map shading not live — only updates on page refresh
items.notes: Root cause: trip/place mutations do not invalidate ['map','shading'] or ['map','regions'] cache keys. useMapShading has 5min stale time. Fix: add map shading cache invalidation to useCreateTrip, useUpdateTripStatus, useLockTrip, useUnlockTrip, useAddPlace, useRemovePlace mutations. Frontend-only fix.

items.title: Trip list missing search by name and sort by date/name
items.notes: PO testing 2026-03-09. TR-10 covers filter by category/activity (may be implemented). Search by name and sort by date/name not covered by current TR-10 wording. BRD update needed to extend TR-10. Verify what filter bar currently exposes before speccing the fix.

items.title: Map click-through not implemented — country/region/city clicks do nothing
items.notes: MP-03 and GE-09 require clicking a country/region/city to open associated trip entries. Component reference shows no click handler or navigation wiring in CountryLayer/RegionLayer/CityMarkers. Frontend to add click handlers that navigate to /trips filtered by country or region, or open a modal. Frontend-only fix.

items.title: Bulk delete trips
items.notes: PO direction 2026-03-09. Required for test data cleanup and general data management. Backend: needs DELETE /api/trips/:id (single) — verify if exists; may need bulk endpoint. Frontend: multi-select in TripList + delete confirmation dialog. Not yet specced.

items.title: Geocoding service not mocked in contract tests — real Nominatim calls in CI
items.notes: Contract tests make live HTTP requests to Nominatim in CI (GitHub Actions has full internet). Causes: non-deterministic tests (external API can be slow/down), unnecessary latency (1100ms delay per city), Nominatim usage policy violation. Locally in devcontainer the firewall masks this — isOnline() returns false, no request made. Fix: add GEOCODING_ENABLED env var (default true); server skips all geocoding when false. Set GEOCODING_ENABLED=false in CI workflow (test-contract job). No mock needed — env flag is simpler and tests already assert pending OR resolved.

items.title: Import booking confirmations — flights, hotels, etc.
items.notes: PO direction 2026-03-09. Explicitly deferred to later phase by PO. Parse booking confirmation emails/PDFs to pre-populate flight/hotel items. Add to BRD §9 (Future Features) at next BRD revision.
